package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall: `strings.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `strings.ReplaceAll(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario662Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
